# Test Document Corpus

Hermetic test fixtures for manual/acceptance testing (`make convert
FILE=testdata/corpus/simple.pdf`, the HTML engine-comparison samples, etc.).

These files were originally generated by the retired Python corpus generator
(`tests/corpus/_generate.py`, removed with the Python retirement — see git tag
`last-python-backend` for the generator source). They are now maintained as
static fixtures: hand-edit or regenerate with any external tool, but keep the
inventory below accurate.

## Inventory

| File              | Pages   | Format | Notes                                |
| ----------------- | ------- | ------ | ------------------------------------ |
| small.docx        | 3       | DOCX   | plain text + page breaks             |
| medium.docx       | 100     | DOCX   | lorem ipsum + page breaks            |
| simple.pptx       | 5       | PPTX   | title + bullet on standard layout    |
| complex.pptx      | 20      | PPTX   | text + shapes (no embedded images)   |
| single_sheet.xlsx | varies  | XLSX   | 100 rows × 20 columns                |
| multi_sheet.xlsx  | varies  | XLSX   | 4 sheets of 10, 20, 30, 40 rows      |
| simple.pdf        | 10      | PDF    | generated by ReportLab               |
| sample.eml        | 1       | EML    | email → PDF path                     |
| sample.html       | 1       | HTML   | static control sample (both engines) |
| sample-js.html    | 1       | HTML   | JS fidelity: setTimeout + window.status="ready" (Gotenberg waitForExpression) |
| sample-ssrf.html  | 1       | HTML   | SSRF deny-policy probe (private-IP image resources) |

PPTX/XLSX page counts depend on Aspose's rendering decisions and are not
asserted at planner level.
